query: SELECT item_key, name_ar, distribution_method, lump_sum_month, start_month, end_month, amount_override, funding_source, section FROM project_cash_flow_settings WHERE item_key IN ('design_fee', 'developer_fee_design', 'survey', 'soil_test') ORDER BY project_id, item_key;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT item_key, name_ar, distribution_method, lump_sum_month, start_month, end_month, amount_override, funding_source, section FROM project_cash_flow_settings WHERE item_key IN ('design_fee', 'developer_fee_design', 'survey', 'soil_test') ORDER BY project_id, item_key;
